The intended invariant (descriptor never serializes write/leak payloads) is already enforced independently and correctly by validateDmsCoreCp199SerializedDescriptor (lines 347-349), which asserts raw_payload_included/document_bytes_included/extracted_text_included/permission_decision_detail_included/audit_event_body_included === false on every record, plus the explicit no-write attestation checks at lines 356-366.
